# --tail N must be forwarded on the wire as tail_n: the mock honours TailN
# by trimming to the most recent N events. Catches a regression where the
# field name diverges from "tail_n".

mockd start
agentctl logs --tail 2 agent-x
! stdout 'first'
! stdout 'second'
! stdout 'third'
stdout 'fourth'
stdout 'lifecycle.exit'
mockd assert-method-called AgentLogs
